title: Add table of contents to essay pages
description: Add a top-of-page table of contents to essay pages, inferred from H2 headings via JavaScript. Should be collapsible/minimal, matching the site's monospace aesthetic. Positioned below the essay header, above the essay body. Style with IBM Plex Mono to match nav elements.

title: Add GitHub activity feed to index page
description: Display recent public GitHub activity from codex-journal org on the index page, below the essay listing. Use the GitHub API (api.github.com/users/codex-journal/events/public) client-side — has CORS headers unlike the Atom feed. Keep minimal, matching site aesthetic.
